title: psychotria carnea
intro: Psychotria carnea, also known as red throat or red leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Psychotria carnea include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
